test.note: Test suite timed out after 300s. Cross-flows specific tests show VAL-CROSS-001 and VAL-CROSS-002 fail due to pre-existing Ollama streaming bug, not test issues. Typecheck and lint passed.

blockingIssues.description: VAL-A11Y-002 (Focus states visible): Tests only verify elements CAN receive keyboard focus (el === document.activeElement), not that focus indicators are VISIBLE. The validation contract requires 'Focused elements have visible focus indicator' with evidence 'screenshot showing focus styles'. Current tests would pass even with invisible focus indicators.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Add CSS computed style checks for focus indicators (outline, box-shadow, background-color changes) or use screenshots to capture focus styles at the moment of focus.

blockingIssues.description: VAL-A11Y-004 (Color contrast meets WCAG AA): Tests only verify text has a non-transparent color (color !== 'transparent'), not that WCAG AA contrast ratios (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text) are met. Current tests would pass even with low-contrast combinations like light gray on white.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Implement actual WCAG luminance contrast ratio calculation using the formula: ((L1 + 0.05) / (L2 + 0.05)) where L is relative luminance, or use axe-core accessibility testing library.

blockingIssues.description: VAL-CROSS-001 and VAL-CROSS-004 tests fail because clicking 'End meditation session' does not show 'Session Complete' heading within 60s timeout. This is a PRE-EXISTING APP BUG - the Ollama streaming never signals completion (the 'Marcus is reflecting...' indicator never disappears), so endSession() cannot complete its flow. The test implementation is correct.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Fix the Ollama streaming completion signaling in the app (the endAndSummarize API call never returns when streaming doesn't complete). This is an app bug, not a test issue.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add mandatory screenshot requirement for accessibility tests where validation contract specifies 'evidence: screenshot'. VAL-A11Y-002 explicitly requires screenshot evidence of focus styles but skill only says 'for visual verification when helpful'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: e2e-accessibility-comprehensive implemented focus tests without screenshots despite contract requiring them

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention for accessibility testing patterns: (1) Focus visibility must be verified via CSS computed styles or screenshots, not just programmatic focus checks, (2) WCAG contrast must use actual luminance ratio calculations or axe-core
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: e2e-accessibility-comprehensive lacks proper patterns for VAL-A11Y-002/004
